CustomField.description: Defines the maximum number of related Opportunities that an Account or Contact can have before being processed in Skew Mode instead of the standard non-skew rollup batch. Records exceeding this threshold are automatically routed to the Skew Mode batch job, which processes Opportunities individually rather than by parent record. Default is 250.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Max related Opportunities before an Account or Contact is processed in Skew Mode. Default is 250. Records above this threshold use the Skew Mode batch job.
CustomField.label: Skew Mode Threshold
